programme.title: Carlton Blues vs Richmond Tigers
programme.desc: Fox Footy has all the build up and fallout from the MCG as Carlton look to rebound from an early loss when they host a young and improving Richmond.

programme.title: Essendon Bombers vs Hawthorn Hawks
programme.desc: Two of the competition's fiercest rivals meet in a Round 1 Friday night blockbuster.

programme.title: Western Bulldogs vs Greater Western Sydney Giants
programme.desc: Marcus Bontempelli and Toby Greene will face off in one of the newest but fiercest rivalries when the Dogs face the Giants at Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: Sydney Swans vs Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: The Swans host the Lions in a big Saturday night clash at the SCG.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Port Adelaide Power
programme.desc: Jason Horne-Francis and the Power will kick off their 2026 season against the Kangaroos at Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: Gold Coast Suns vs West Coast Eagles
programme.desc: Round 1 concludes with the Eagles opening their 2026 campaign with a trip to the Gold Coast.

programme.title: Hawthorn Hawks vs Sydney Swans
programme.desc: The Hawks host the Swans in Round 2.

programme.title: Chinese Grand Prix
programme.desc: A week on from a chaotic Australian Grand Prix weekend, drivers head out for the only practice session at the Shanghai Circuit.

programme.title: Chinese Grand Prix
programme.desc: China is the first of six sprint events this season, as drivers battle for pole position in the opening Sprint Qualifying session of 2026.

programme.title: Chinese Grand Prix
programme.desc: Shanghai hosts the first F1 Sprint of 2026. Drivers face a 19-lap dash as teams test new aero under revamped regulations.

programme.title: Chinese Grand Prix
programme.desc: Mercedes duo George Russell and Kimi Antonelli secured the front row in Melbourne last week and will be the ones to watch when qualifying begins.

programme.title: Chinese Grand Prix
programme.desc: The F1 season heads to Shanghai as George Russell chases a second straight win, while Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc aims to disrupt the Silver Arrows’ early dominance.

programme.title: Wests Tigers vs North Queensland
programme.desc: Wests Tigers begin their 2026 campaign against the Cowboys who are chasing a hat-trick of wins at Leichhardt Oval.

programme.title: St George Illawarra vs Melbourne
programme.desc: The hosts return to Wollongong after a heartbreaking loss in Vegas, while the visitors were one of Round 1's most impressive winners.

programme.title: Penrith vs Cronulla
programme.desc: Super Saturday's nightcap sees two dominant Round 1 winners meet at Bathurst in Central West NSW.

programme.title: Dolphins vs Gold Coast Titans
programme.desc: Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane is the venue for a Queensland Derby expected to involve plenty of points.

programme.title: Geelong Cats vs Fremantle Dockers
programme.desc: Super Saturday continues when the Dockers open their 2026 campaign with a trip to Geelong.

programme.title: Collingwood Magpies vs Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: The ageless Pies host the 2025 minor premiers who will be desperate for redemption after last year’s straight set finals heartbreak.

programme.title: Melbourne Demons vs St Kilda Saints
programme.desc: The Demons host the Saints in a big Round One clash at the MCG.

programme.title: Mavericks vs Giants Netball
programme.desc: The 2026 SSN season kicks off with the Mavericks hosting the Giants at Red Energy Stadium, Bendigo.

programme.title: Adelaide Thunderbirds vs NSW Swifts
programme.desc: The Swifts are looking to bounce back after a disappointing finals series last season, they travel to Adelaide to take on the Thunderbirds.

programme.title: Queensland Firebirds vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The Vixens begin their quest to go back-to-back as they travel to Queensland to take on last year's wooden spooners at Nissan Arena.

programme.title: West Coast Fever vs Sunshine Coast Lightning
programme.desc: After a heartbreaking grand final loss the Fever will be out for revenge as they begin their season hosting the Lightning at RAC Arena.

programme.title: Adelaide Thunderbirds vs West Coast Fever
programme.desc: The Thunderbirds and Fever clash in Adelaide.

programme.title: Giants Netball vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The Giants host the Vixens in Sydney.

programme.title: NSW Swifts vs Mavericks
programme.desc: The Swifts host the Mavericks in Sydney.
